name: Robin CycFX 8
comment:
Robin CycFX 8™: An array of individually controlled 15W RGBW LED modules equally spaced along the strip with fully adjustable zoom from 8-67 degrees. The strip itself has a very fast 270 degree tilt movement which can be precision indexed or programmed to produce rapid sweeping movements. Pre-programmed colour macros and pixel control makes this fixture quick and easy to programme. Tungsten lamp emulation and fade effects at 2700 K and 3200 K are included. Wireless technology CRMX is available as an option. 

Please be aware, since this is a discontinued product, all physical values in this library may not be entirely accurate for this model.

capabilities.comment: Random strobe effect slow to fast - Slow
